license.name: Government of India Open Data License

indicator.title: Renewable energy: installed vs potential capacity (national)
indicator.description: India's installed renewable capacity compared with assessed potential, by source (Hydro, Wind, Solar, Small-Hydro, Biomass). The `facet` field encodes 'source | capacity_type' where capacity_type is 'installed capacity' or 'potential capacity'. Potential figures are MNRE/CEA assessed estimates (resource potential at typical conditions). Snapshot ingested from NITI Aayog ICED.
indicator.methodology_vintage: MNRE potential assessments + CEA installed capacity (composed by ICED). Reference date approximated to file ingest date.
